flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Milligan University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.1k → $40.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Milligan University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.1k → $40.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Milligan University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (62.0% → 55.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Milligan University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (60.3% vs 66.2%).
